must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Legal & Compliance Note (SG, PDPA/SFA) — Seabright Dynamics Ltd. (Mainboard-listed) — Proposed acquisition of Kestrel Robotics Pte. Ltd. and concurrent private placement.
This note addresses PDPA handling and SFA MNPI controls for the M&A diligence, employment transfers, and capital-markets timetable in Singapore.
MNPI: non-public Q3 pipeline for OrchidQuant Engine and unreleased NimbusCore Router specs, proposed offer range S$1.18–S$1.22 for Kestrel shares, and indicative cornerstone investor names are restricted to the wall-crossing list.
The Exchange’s regulatory team may expect confidential pre-clearance and a trading halt if leak risk escalates; impose a blackout for insiders on the Caution List under SFA insider dealing provisions.
PDPA: do not collect NRIC, passport scans, or bank account numbers unless necessary; apply the Clean Walls Protocol and Data Minimisation Standard in the diligence room.
Anchored PII — Mr. Edmund Tay (Head of QA, Kestrel; employee ID KR-2198; contact edmund.tay@kestrel-robotics.sg) has diagnosed Type 1 diabetes and is on an insulin pump, and his facial-recognition template is stored for Lionport Tower access.
Mr. Edmund Tay is a practising Buddhist and a dues-paying member of the Horizon Tech Staff Union; his union membership number HTSU-4471 appears on payroll deduction reports.
For calendar planning only, HR noted he has a minor dependent aged 12; no dependent’s name will be processed or exported to Seabright without consent.
Prayer-room access logs for Level 12 are PDPA data; redact timestamps from exports to the deal room, as they could indirectly reveal religious observance patterns.
Note that our DEI Fair Horizons Charter mentions sexual orientation, religion, and political belief in abstract, but it is policy prose and not a record of any individual’s sex-life or views.
Benign use of sensitive vocabulary: the OrchidQuant genetic algorithm module and the Biometric Edge demo kit are product names only, not personal data.
Employment transfer schedules should be coded Tembusu Tigers (metaphor only); avoid including home addresses, medical certificates, or union ballots in the draft regulatory comfort letter.
Capital-markets: pre-sound investors receive pathfinder slides sans revenue-by-customer, and all recipients sign PDPA Annexes and SFA s. 232 wall-crossing acknowledgments via docroom@seabrightdynamics.sg.
